author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
content: Completed Phase 1 TUI dashboard (crosslink tui command). Commit 5f93d66 on feature/crosslink-tui-dashboard. Delivered: Tab trait with 5 tabs (Issues active, 4 placeholder), IssuesTab with list view (sort/filter/search) and detail view (comments, deps, labels), help overlay, panic-safe terminal cleanup. 1285 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean. Ready for push and PR. Remaining unstaged files are worktree setup, not feature changes.
